name: kidma-marketing
description: Kidma outreach and communication tools — newsletters, stakeholder presentations, social content (coming soon)

output.description: Frontmatter + Hebrew Markdown body printed to chat for human review

input.description: A Kidma article — full .md block (from write-article) or a description of the article content

output.description: Two labeled Nano Banana image prompts (Style A: documentary photography, Style B: conceptual illustration) printed to chat, plus a Hebrew recommendation

changelog.notes: Added article-image-prompt skill — Nano Banana image prompt generator for article hero and body images
Added write-article skill — Hebrew article drafting for kid-ma.com, newsletters, and school proposals
